Subject: *EMCA* Reminder - West of Stanford Heavy Trash Day
Message:
We would like to remind you of this upcoming event.

West of Stanford Heavy Trash Day 

Date: Tuesday, February 12, 2002 
Time: All Day

The Second Tuesday of each month is Heavy Trash Day in *West*
East Montrose. That is, homes West of Stanford Street will have
heavy trash collected the second Tuesday of each month.  Time to
lug your heavy trash out to the curb.
